title: stachypitys disticha
intro: Stachypitys disticha, also known as New Zealand tea tree or Stachy, is a shrub-like plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stachypitys disticha include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Stachypitys disticha can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or it can be used in tinctures, salves, and other herbal preparations.
